display.purpose: Hero headlines and slideshow titles. Used at most once per page.

headline.purpose: Section headings. Used 3–5 times per page.

title.purpose: Product names, card headings, detail labels. The workhorse of the product grid.

body.purpose: All running text. Capped at 65–75ch in prose blocks.

label.purpose: Product category eyebrows and badge text. The only all-caps element in the system.

shadows.name: ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Product card hover state. Paired with -4px Y translation.

shadows.name: structural-hover
shadows.purpose: Setup card hover and dropdown panels.

shadows.name: floating-control
shadows.purpose: Carousel arrows, mobile cart FAB, fixed action buttons.

motion.name: ease-color
motion.purpose: Color and background-color transitions on buttons, links, and interactive elements.

motion.name: ease-lift
motion.purpose: Card hover lift (translateY + shadow). Pairs with image scale on 500ms delay.

motion.name: ease-image
motion.purpose: Image scale on card hover (105%). Disabled in reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Shop Black background, white text, full-round or rounded-md depending on context.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 3rem; padding: 0 2rem; background: var(--primary); color: #fff; font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.938rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--primary-hover); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with Shop Black text and Border stroke. Hover fills Border Light.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0 1.25rem; background: transparent; color: var(--text); font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--border-light); border-color: var(--text-muted); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary inline action. No border, subtle color. Hover reveals background and shifts toward Shop Black.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; background: transparent; color: var(--text-secondary); font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--border-light); color: var(--text); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Standard product grid card with image, category eyebrow, name, description, price, and star rating.
components.html:
Bestseller
Monitor Stand

Walnut Monitor Riser

Solid FSC-certified American walnut. Hidden storage drawer.

$49.99$69.99
components.css: .ds-card-product { background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out, transform 200ms ease-out; } .ds-card-product:hover { box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-card-image { aspect-ratio: 1; background: #f5f5f4; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-badge { position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; z-index: 1; font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--primary); color: #fff; } .ds-card-add { position: absolute; bottom: 12px; right: 12px; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.25rem; color: var(--primary); opacity: 0; transform: translateX(8px); transition: opacity 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease, background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-card-product:hover .ds-card-add { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } .ds-card-add:hover { background: var(--primary); color: #fff; } .ds-card-body { padding: 1rem; } .ds-card-eyebrow { display: block; font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--primary); margin: 0 0 4px 0; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-card-product:hover .ds-card-title { color: var(--accent); } .ds-card-desc { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.625; color: var(--text-muted); margin: 0 0 12px 0; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-card-price { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.938rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary); } .ds-card-compare { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: line-through; margin-left: 6px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-card-product:hover { transform: none; } .ds-card-add { transition: opacity 200ms ease; } }

components.name: Category Card
components.description: Signature homepage category card with gradient overlay and text on image. Used in the 4-column category grid.
components.html:
Monitor Stands

Shop Collection
components.css: .ds-card-category { position: relative; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 4/5; background: #d6d3d1; cursor: pointer; } .ds-cat-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.6), transparent); } .ds-card-category:hover .ds-cat-overlay { background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.7), transparent); transition: background 300ms ease; } .ds-cat-text { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 1.25rem; z-index: 1; } .ds-cat-title { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; margin: 0 0 4px 0; } .ds-cat-link { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Desktop header navigation link. Text Muted at rest, color-shifts to Shop Black on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: var(--text); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input with Border stroke, Border Light fill, and Indigo Ink focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; background: var(--border-light); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text); transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--accent); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--accent); }

components.name: Product Badge
components.description: Product card overlay badge. Variants: dark (Bestseller/Best Value), indigo (Popular/New), emerald (Eco/Value), red (Sale).
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; line-height: 1; } .ds-badge--bestseller { background: var(--primary); color: #fff; } .ds-badge--popular { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; } .ds-badge--eco { background: #059669; color: #fff; } .ds-badge--sale { background: #dc2626; color: #fff; }

narrative.overview:
DeskVibe is a design exhibition, not a warehouse. Every product earns its spot on the page. The interface treats products with the curatorial care of a gallery — generous white space, considered photography, and typographic restraint that lets the materials speak. The system is warm without being soft, confident without being loud, and premium without being precious.

The palette anchors in Shop Black (#1c1917) — a warm near-black with wood-shop character — supported by a tight stone neutral scale and a single Indigo Ink accent (#6366f1) used sparingly for interactive signifiers. Figtree runs across every surface: a single sans-serif family at multiple weights, chosen for its clean geometry and warm, humanist details. The system is fundamentally flat at rest; depth arrives only as state (hover lift on cards, focus rings on inputs). Motion is brief and material — quick fades, gentle lifts — never choreographed.

This system explicitly rejects three aesthetics from PRODUCT.md: marketplace density (crowded grids, competing badges), cold SaaS blue-grey (sterile, abstract, no tactile warmth), and luxury-fashion pretension (black backgrounds, dramatic type, impractical presentation). If a page feels like an Amazon category grid, it's wrong. If it feels like a startup landing page, it's wrong. If it feels like a fashion house, it's wrong. It should feel like walking into a well-lit design studio where every object on display was chosen.
keyCharacteristics: Single sans-serif family (Figtree) across all surfaces; weight and size carry the hierarchy
Restrained palette: warm black primary, single indigo accent, white + stone neutrals
Flat at rest; depth on hover via shadow and micro-lift
Cards are used for products and editorial groupings only — never nested, never decorative
Curatorial spacing: generous but not wasteful. Section rhythm varies deliberately
Typography is tight-tracked on headings, open on body; no wide tracking, no all-caps decoration except product category labels

rules.name: The 10% Rule
rules.body: Indigo Ink appears on ≤10% of any given screen. It's a signal, not a decoration. If more than two non-link elements use it in the same viewport, it's over-deployed.

rules.name: The Stone Bridge Rule
rules.body: All neutrals between White and Shop Black stay within the stone hue (30–60° in OKLCH). Never introduce cool grays (slate, blue-gray) or warm creams (sand, beige) — the neutral ramp must feel like it belongs to the same material as Shop Black.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Figtree or nothing. Never introduce a second typeface. Hierarchy is weight + size + color, not font-switching.

rules.name: The Tracking Floor Rule
rules.body: Heading tracking never drops below -0.04em. At tighter values, Figtree's letterforms begin to touch. If a heading needs more presence, increase weight or size before tightening tracking further.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus). No card should cast a shadow unless the user is interacting with it.

rules.name: The One-Pixel Border Rule
rules.body: Depth between adjacent surfaces at rest is conveyed through border and background color, not shadow. A 1px border on Warm Paper is the maximum structural separator. No decorative side-stripe borders.

dos: Do use Figtree exclusively — weight and size carry the hierarchy, not font-switching.
Do use Shop Black (#1c1917) as the single primary ink. Never pure #000.
Do limit Indigo Ink to ≤10% of any screen. It's a signal, not a decoration.
Do keep cards flat at rest. Shadows only on hover.
Do alternate white and Warm Paper sections for page rhythm — but never more than 3 consecutive tinted sections.
Do cap body line length at 65–75ch in prose blocks.
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 headings; text-wrap: pretty on body text.
Do let product photography lead. Images are large, considered, and the primary visual draw.
Do respect reduced motion: replace auto-advancing carousels with static slides, disable hover scale transforms.
donts: Don't introduce a second typeface. No serif pairings, no mono accents. Figtree is the system.
Don't use marketplace density patterns — crowded grids, stacked badges, competing CTAs, information overload. DeskVibe is a studio, not a warehouse.
Don't drift into cold SaaS aesthetic — sterile blue-white-grey palettes, abstract illustrations, generic gradient backdrops.
Don't adopt luxury-fashion pretension — black backgrounds, dramatic serif typography, aspirational-but-impractical presentation.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Solid Shop Black or Indigo Ink only.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px) as colored accents.
Don't set heading letter-spacing below -0.04em. Figtree letterforms will touch.
Don't use shadows at rest. If a card has a box-shadow without hover/focus, it's wrong.
Don't place an eyebrow above every section heading.
